owner.name: Ibrahim Adam
owner.title: Software Engineer
owner.bio: A dedicated and collaborative Software Engineer with three years of experience specializing in backend and full-stack JavaScript development. Currently supporting large-scale enterprise applications at PT Pegadaian, including managing an attendance system utilized by over 20,000 users. Demonstrated ability to work closely with cross-functional teams, such as IT Security and Infrastructure, to ensure smooth and secure application deliveries.

experience.description: Supporting large-scale enterprise applications including an attendance management system for 20,000+ users and a Customer Experience Management dashboard.
highlights: PIC for ARALIA, a vendor attendance management app used by 20,000+ users across Indonesia
Developed CEM dashboard using Vue.js to visualize WhatsApp-based survey feedback
Implemented iLeads × LinkedIn Learning integration for automated training data synchronization
Coordinated with IT Security, Infrastructure, and Release Management for secure deployments
Led code reviews from vendors ensuring code quality and security compliance

experience.description: Developed web-based clinic and hospital management applications supporting patient data administration and healthcare interoperability.
highlights: Built and integrated patient data management systems with SATUSEHAT for standardized health data exchange
Developed clinic and hospital management applications using Vue.js and Node.js
Ensured compliance with national healthcare interoperability requirements
Supported patient data administration, medical records, and operational workflows

experience.description: Designed and developed management systems for Siloam Hospitals to handle doctor profiles, schedules, and hospital information across multiple locations.
highlights: Built Doctor Management System managing profiles and schedules across multiple hospital locations
Integrated data from existing hospital databases for real-time updates and consistency
Developed interactive administrative dashboard and CMS for hospital information management
Worked with Vue.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis for scalable healthcare solutions

education.description: Completed a 16-week intensive full-stack web development bootcamp focusing on JavaScript technologies including Node.js, Vue.js, React, React Native, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis. Developed RESTful APIs with authentication (bcrypt, JWT) and caching strategies.
Graduated Cum Laude with a GPA of 3.62/4.00. Developed strong discipline, teamwork, and analytical skills that translate into a methodical approach to software engineering.

projects.title: Customer Experience Management Dashboard
projects.description: A Vue.js dashboard to visualize WhatsApp-based customer survey feedback across multiple product lines at Pegadaian, enabling business teams to monitor satisfaction trends.
projects.overview: Developed a Customer Experience Management (CEM) dashboard using Vue.js to visualize WhatsApp-based customer survey feedback across multiple product lines at Pegadaian. The dashboard enables business teams to monitor satisfaction trends and gain actionable insights for service improvement. Built with a focus on intuitive data visualization and real-time feedback monitoring, helping stakeholders make data-driven decisions to enhance customer experience across the organization.

media.caption: Main dashboard showing customer satisfaction trends across product lines
Detailed analytics view of WhatsApp survey feedback data
Actionable insights panel for business team decision-making

projects.title: ARALIA — Vendor Attendance Management
projects.description: Pegadaian's vendor attendance management application supporting 20,000+ users across Indonesia with secure and scalable architecture.
projects.overview: Served as the Person in Charge (PIC) for ARALIA, Pegadaian's vendor attendance management application supporting 20,000+ users across Indonesia. Led code reviews from vendors and coordinated with IT Security, Infrastructure, Release Management, and business users to deliver secure, reliable, and scalable application improvements. Ensured smooth deployments and maintained high availability for this mission-critical enterprise system.

media.caption: Enterprise attendance dashboard managing 20,000+ vendor employees
User and role management panel for nationwide deployment
Automated attendance reports and compliance monitoring

projects.title: iLeads × LinkedIn Learning Integration
projects.description: Automated synchronization between Pegadaian's internal iLeads learning platform and LinkedIn Learning to improve employee training visibility.
projects.overview: Implemented an integration between the internal iLeads learning platform and LinkedIn Learning, enabling automated synchronization of learning data and improving visibility of employee training progress across the organization. This integration streamlined the tracking of employee professional development, providing managers and HR with consolidated insights into learning activities and course completions from both internal and external platforms.

media.caption: Consolidated learning progress dashboard from iLeads and LinkedIn
Real-time synchronization status and data flow monitoring
Employee training progress analytics and reporting

projects.title: Doctor Management System — Siloam Hospitals
projects.description: A management system for Siloam Hospitals to handle doctor profiles, schedules, and hospital information across multiple locations in Indonesia.
projects.overview: Designed and developed a Doctor Management System for Siloam Hospitals to manage doctor profiles, schedules, and hospital-related information across multiple locations in Indonesia. Integrated data from existing hospital databases to enable real-time updates and consistency across systems, while developing an interactive administrative dashboard and a content management system (CMS) to streamline management of doctor and hospital information.

media.caption: Doctor profile management across multiple hospital locations
Interactive scheduling dashboard for doctor appointments
Content management system for hospital and doctor information

projects.title: Clinic Management Application
projects.description: Web-based clinic and hospital management application supporting patient data administration, medical records, and operational workflows.
projects.overview: Developed web-based clinic and hospital management applications to support patient data administration, medical records, and operational workflows across healthcare facilities in Indonesia. Built and integrated patient data management systems with SATUSEHAT, enabling standardized health data exchange and supporting compliance with national healthcare interoperability requirements.

media.caption: Patient data administration and clinic operations overview
Digital medical records management with SATUSEHAT integration
Operational workflow management for healthcare facilities
